IMPORTANT — gradle-wrapper.jar
==============================
This binary file cannot be generated as text.

When you open this project in Android Studio (even once, on any computer),
it will auto-generate the real gradle-wrapper.jar file here automatically.

Alternatively, if you want to skip Android Studio entirely:
1. Go to https://github.com/new and create your repo
2. Upload all files EXCEPT this folder
3. In your repo, go to Actions > "Build IronLock APK" > Run workflow
   GitHub will download Gradle automatically — no jar needed!

The workflow is configured to handle this for you.
